Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the image, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. This join also is used to provide "selected" feedback from the control system and change the mode to 1 when high and mode to 0 when low if the Mode Analog Join is not set. Note: When Mode Analog Join is set, feedback of Press Digital Join from the control system will not change the mode.

NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the image will always be enabled.

Show Local Feedback
false	Momentary
	Momentary
Root.Properties.Momentary
The 'Show Local Feedback' property is used to display feedback based on the local touch and not based on information sent from the control system. While pressed, the Mode will change to 1, while not pressed the Mode will revert to 0. Note: When Mode Analog Join is set or Press Digital Join is set, this property will not have any effect.

Input Channel
InputChannel
InputChannel
xs:minInclusive1Root.Properties.AnnotationProperties.InputChannel
Channel used to receive annotations from other peers. Ex. if input channel is set to 2, then annotations are received when any peer sets their output channel to 2. Valid values are 1-8. A value of 0 indicates the channel should not be established.
Input Channel Analog Join

;Root.Properties.AnnotationProperties.InputChannelAnalogJoin0Select the analog join to set the input channel.

OutputChannel
xs:minInclusive2Root.Properties.AnnotationProperties.OutputChannel
Channel used to send annotations to other peers. Ex. if output channel is set to 2, then any peer that has their input channel set to 2 will get the annotations. Valid values are 1-8. A value of 0 indicates the channel should not be established.

 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
When a join is specified and the signal is low, the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join greater than 0 is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the control to respond to press events. If no join is selected, the control will always be enabled. The analog Mode join and Focus On join will be ignored if the control system sets this join low.

NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.

Display Labels On Screens

DisplayLabels
DisplayLabels
%Root.Properties.Screens.DisplayLabels5Enables or disables the display of labels on screens.
Screen Margin
Margin
Margin
Root.Properties.Screens.Margin
The margin dictates the amount of space (in pixels) left as a border between the edge of the screen and the icon when it is dropped onto the screen. The margin also reflects the space left for the icon when it is dropped.
Local Drop Mode
false	LocalMode
	LocalMode
!Root.Properties.Screens.LocalMode
If this value is checked, the icon will be assigned to the screen locally and so that control system feedback is unnecessary. Otherwise, when an analog is dispatched, the simple program must feedback that value in order for the icon to be populated to the screen.
EnforceGeometry
true
EnforceGeometry
EnforceGeometry
'Root.Properties.Screens.EnforceGeometry
When enforce geometry is selected, the control will always divide the screens into a number of rows and columns such that there is no overflow of remainder on to a new line. However, if a large prime number of screens is assigned, the control will populate the screens in one very long row. If the number of screens is a non-standard denomination, this property should be left unchecked.
Screen Aspect Ratio
16:9
ScreenAspectRatio
4:3|16:9|Stretch|
ScreenAspectRatio
)Root.Properties.Screens.ScreenAspectRatio
The aspect ratio of the drag and drop screen area. If this value is set the screens will always maintain the specified aspect ratio.
Number of Screens
ScreenCount
Screen
ScreenCount
#Root.Properties.Screens.ScreenCount
Sets the maximum number of screens on the control (range: 1-36). *NOTE* A minimum screen size of 80Wx60H will be enforced. Your total number of screens may be limited automatically if the size of the control is exceeded.
Screen
Number of Columns
ColumnCount
ColumnCount
#Root.Properties.Screens.ColumnCount
Sets the number of columns in the grid view. Setting to zero disables this feature and returns to standard calculations. *NOTE* A minimum screen size of 80Wx60H will be enforced. Your total number of columns may be limited automatically if the width of the control is exceeded.

Root.Properties
The Video Switcher widget combines a scrolling list with drag and drop functionality geared towards controlling video sources in a switcher matrix.  Assigning a Smart Object ID enables full control over the number of screens, source assignments, and provides feedback to the control system when a source changes on the touch panel.

Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.

!Root.Properties.SelectedModeState
Specifies the Icon and Label properties while in the 'Selected' State. Selected state is the state where control system is asserting the Digital Press Join high and not in the 'Pressed' State. The 'Show Control Feedback' button needs to be selected for this state to be used and the Digital Press Join must be provided and be driven high by the control system.. This is equivalent to the Active state in pre Smart Graphics projects.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.
Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

	Page Flip
(None)
PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

!Root.Properties.SelectedModeState
Specifies the Icon and Label properties while in the 'Selected' State. Selected state is the state where control system is asserting the Digital Press Join high and not in the 'Pressed' State. The 'Show Control Feedback' button needs to be selected for this state to be used and the Digital Press Join must be provided and be driven high by the control system.. This is equivalent to the Active state in pre Smart Graphics projects.

Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the image, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. This join also is used to provide "selected" feedback from the control system and change the mode to 1 when high and mode to 0 when low if the Mode Analog Join is not set. Note: When Mode Analog Join is set, feedback of Press Digital Join from the control system will not change the mode.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the image will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the image will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the image will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the image will always be displayed.

false
SuppressKeyClicks
SuppressKeyClicks
!Root.Properties.SuppressKeyClicks4When true suppresses the key click sound on presses.
Show Local Feedback
false	Momentary
	Momentary
Root.Properties.Momentary
The 'Show Local Feedback' property is used to display feedback based on the local touch and not based on information sent from the control system. While pressed, the Mode will change to 1, while not pressed the Mode will revert to 0. Note: When Mode Analog Join is set or Press Digital Join is set, this property will not have any effect.

false

EnableClickThrough

Input Channel
InputChannel
InputChannel
xs:minInclusive1Root.Properties.AnnotationProperties.InputChannel
Channel used to receive annotations from other peers. Ex. if input channel is set to 2, then annotations are received when any peer sets their output channel to 2. Valid values are 1-8. A value of 0 indicates the channel should not be established.

xs:minInclusive2Root.Properties.AnnotationProperties.OutputChannel
Channel used to send annotations to other peers. Ex. if output channel is set to 2, then any peer that has their input channel set to 2 will get the annotations. Valid values are 1-8. A value of 0 indicates the channel should not be established.

Configures which design time orientation will have the camera view rotated. Example 1: A rotation locked, portrait orientation project will leave the default as Primary Only. IRoot.Properties.ModesOrDynamicGraphics.RotateCamera.RotateCameraDirection
Configures which direction to rotate. Default 90 Degrees Counter Clockwise puts the right thumb on the iPhone Home button when viewing a landscape camera on a rotation locked, portrait orientation Crestron App project. Only applicable if Rotate Camera View is enabled.

5Root.Properties.ModesOrDynamicGraphics.AnalogModeJoin
Select an analog join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join is used to select which mode the image will display. Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.

Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.

TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin

Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.

TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the subpage has finished transitioning on to the page.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.

Both|Landscape|Portrait
OrientationVisibility
%Root.Properties.OrientationVisibilityKUsed to determine which page orientation to show this subpage reference in.
 Transition Complete Digital Join
TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the subpage has finished transitioning on to the page.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

AnalogJoinOffset
AnalogJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.AnalogJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Root.Properties.TransitionOutPThe transition this page will use when it leaves the visible area of the screen.
Is Subpage
False	IsSubpage
	IsSubpage
Root.Properties.IsSubpage
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this page and the control system. This join will trigger this page to become shown and all other pages to be hidden on a digital high signal. Feedback to the control system corresponds with the visibility of the page.
 Transition Complete Digital Join
TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the page has finished transitioning on to the page.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.
Analog Join Offset
AnalogJoinOffset
AnalogJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.AnalogJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.
Serial Join Offset
SerialJoinOffset
SerialJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.SerialJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Root.Properties.IsSubpage
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this page and the control system. This join will trigger this page to become shown and all other pages to be hidden on a digital high signal. Feedback to the control system corresponds with the visibility of the page.
 Transition Complete Digital Join
TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the page has finished transitioning on to the page.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

AnalogJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.AnalogJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. The Formatted Text control is used to display advanced text on a touch panel.  It supports HTML text via an Indirect Text Serial Join as well as static text defined at design time. IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
When a join is specified and the signal is low, the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join greater than 0 is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the control to respond to press events. If no join is selected, the control will always be enabled. The analog Mode join and Focus On join will be ignored if the control system sets this join low.

ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

Control Name
Simple Keypad
ControlName
ControlName
Root.ControlName
Category Name
Keypad
CategoryName
CategoryName
Root.CategoryName
ControlSummary
The Simple Keypad control is a flexible numeric keypad which always displays 0-9 like a standard telephone, but allows for customizable miscellaneous buttons.  If the miscellaneous buttons are not necessary, they can be removed by deleting the text from each of their respective Signal Labels.  Programming this control only requires a Smart Object ID, enabling Digital Press Joins to be sent from the panel to the control system.

 Root.Properties.OverrideAlphabet
Root.Properties
The Simple Keypad control is a flexible numeric keypad which always displays 0-9 like a standard telephone, but allows for customizable miscellaneous buttons.  If the miscellaneous buttons are not necessary, they can be removed by deleting the text from each of their respective Signal Labels.  Programming this control only requires a Smart Object ID, enabling Digital Press Joins to be sent from the panel to the control system.
	SWF-3-END

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.

ControlSummary
The Simple Label control is used to display basic text on a touch panel.  It has Font Color, and Font Size properties exposed instead of relying on HTML text for its formatting.  It also supports indirect text, CIP HTML tags, along with multiline and text truncating.

Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
When a join is specified and the signal is low, the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join greater than 0 is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the control to respond to press events. If no join is selected, the control will always be enabled. The analog Mode join and Focus On join will be ignored if the control system sets this join low.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.

	Page Flip

PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.

Root.Properties.SubpageFlipZSubpage Flip allows selection of a subpage to be made visible when this button is pressed.
Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

false

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance
Sets an integer value representing the number of pixels to offset the X and Y of the shadow. Valid range is 1 to 5. The default value is 2.

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

Is Subpage
true	IsSubpage
	IsSubpage
Root.Properties.IsSubpage
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.
 Transition Complete Digital Join
TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the page has finished transitioning on to the subpage.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.
Analog Join Offset
AnalogJoinOffset
AnalogJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.AnalogJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.
Serial Join Offset
SerialJoinOffset
SerialJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.SerialJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the image will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the image will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.

ControlSummary
The D-Pad control allows for a realistic feeling and looking D-Pad with up, down, left, right and center buttons.  Each button has a Digital Join output via the Smart Object ID.   Additionally the center button has the ability to have customizable text allowing flexible application of the control.

Smart Object ID
ControlJoin
ControlJoin
xs:maxInclusive
Root.Properties.ControlJoinjThe Smart Object ID is an encapsulated join type that links a smart control in VT-Pro with a CED in SIMPL.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.

false

!Root.Properties.SuppressKeyClicks4When true suppresses the key click sound on presses.

Root.Properties.Style
The styled graphics and font styling information that determine the look/feel of the dpad and the center button text. The graphic contains a 6 state image with one rested state and one state for each pressed area.

Root.Properties
The D-Pad control allows for a realistic feeling and looking D-Pad with up, down, left, right and center buttons.  Each button has a Digital Join output via the Smart Object ID.   Additionally the center button has the ability to have customizable text allowing flexible application of the control.

Control Name
Simple Keypad
ControlName
ControlName
Root.ControlName
Category Name
Keypad
CategoryName
CategoryName
Root.CategoryName
ControlSummary
The Simple Keypad control is a flexible numeric keypad which always displays 0-9 like a standard telephone, but allows for customizable miscellaneous buttons.  If the miscellaneous buttons are not necessary, they can be removed by deleting the text from each of their respective Signal Labels.  Programming this control only requires a Smart Object ID, enabling Digital Press Joins to be sent from the panel to the control system.

Smart Object ID
ControlJoin
ControlJoin
xs:maxInclusive
Root.Properties.ControlJoinjThe Smart Object ID is an encapsulated join type that links a smart control in VT-Pro with a CED in SIMPL.
Digital Press Start Join
DigitalPressStartJoin
DigitalPressStartJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalPressStartJoin
Setting this property, while the Smart Object ID is not set (ID = 0), will enable standard joins to be triggered in the control system. The joins increment from the starting join in the following order: 0-9, Misc 1, Misc 2
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.

 Root.Properties.OverrideAlphabet
Root.Properties
The Simple Keypad control is a flexible numeric keypad which always displays 0-9 like a standard telephone, but allows for customizable miscellaneous buttons.  If the miscellaneous buttons are not necessary, they can be removed by deleting the text from each of their respective Signal Labels.  Programming this control only requires a Smart Object ID, enabling Digital Press Joins to be sent from the panel to the control system.
SWF-14-END

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

ControlSummary
The Simple Label control is used to display basic text on a touch panel.  It has Font Color, and Font Size properties exposed instead of relying on HTML text for its formatting.  It also supports indirect text, CIP HTML tags, along with multiline and text truncating.

Indirect Text Serial Join

IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
When a join is specified and the signal is low, the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join greater than 0 is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the control to respond to press events. If no join is selected, the control will always be enabled. The analog Mode join and Focus On join will be ignored if the control system sets this join low.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

$Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties<These properties allow a shadow to be placed under the text.
Root.Properties
The Simple Label control is used to display basic text on a touch panel.  It has Font Color, and Font Size properties exposed instead of relying on HTML text for its formatting.  It also supports indirect text, CIP HTML tags, along with multiline and text truncating.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

ControlSummary
The Formatted Text control is used to display advanced text on a touch panel.  It supports HTML text via an Indirect Text Serial Join as well as static text defined at design time.  Additionally it can be used as multiline and/or truncated text, and supports all of the CIP tags documented in the CIP HTML tag document.

Indirect Text Serial Join

IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
When a join is specified and the signal is low, the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join greater than 0 is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the control to respond to press events. If no join is selected, the control will always be enabled. The analog Mode join and Focus On join will be ignored if the control system sets this join low.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

$Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties<These properties allow a shadow to be placed under the text.
Root.Properties
The Formatted Text control is used to display advanced text on a touch panel.  It supports HTML text via an Indirect Text Serial Join as well as static text defined at design time.  Additionally it can be used as multiline and/or truncated text, and supports all of the CIP tags documented in the CIP HTML tag document.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.

DigitalVisibilityJoin

Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.
 Transition Complete Digital Join
TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the page has finished transitioning on to the subpage.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

AnalogJoinOffset
AnalogJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.AnalogJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the image will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. Root.Properties.IconType\A choice of whether to display a styled image, a custom image as an icon, or no icon at all.
Horizontal Text Alignment
Center
TextAlignment
Left|Center|Right|
TextAlignment
Root.Properties.TextAlignment9Determines the horizontal alignment of the text and icon.
	Page Flip
(None)
PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.
SubpageFlip
SubpageFlip
SubpageFlip
Root.Properties.SubpageFlipZSubpage Flip allows selection of a subpage to be made visible when this button is pressed.
Show Control Feedback
true
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

false
SuppressKeyClicks

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.

Show Control Feedback
true
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength

Use Project Theme
True
UseProjectTheme
UseProjectTheme
Root.Properties.UseProjectTheme
If this property is selected, this subpage will use whatever theme is applied to the project automatically. NOTE: if you override this property, any theme switches made will not be applied to this subpage.
Page Theme Analog Join
PageThemeJoin
PageThemeJoin
Root.Properties.PageThemeJoin
Select an analog join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join is used to synchronize the theme of this from the control system.
Subpage Theme
CT_Neo.xml
ThemeID
ThemeID
Root.Properties.ThemeID
The theme to apply to this subpage if the project theme is overridden. NOTE: if you override this property, any theme switches made will not be applied to this subpage.

Root.Properties.TransitionOutSThe transition this subpage will use when it leaves the visible area of the screen.
Is Subpage
true	IsSubpage
	IsSubpage
Root.Properties.IsSubpage
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.
 Transition Complete Digital Join
TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the page has finished transitioning on to the subpage.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.
Analog Join Offset
AnalogJoinOffset
AnalogJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.AnalogJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.
Serial Join Offset
SerialJoinOffset
SerialJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.SerialJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the image will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the image will always be enabled.

Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

false

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance
Sets an integer value representing the number of pixels to offset the X and Y of the shadow. Valid range is 1 to 5. The default value is 2.

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45
Shadow Blur X

ShadowBlurX
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.

Control Name
Formatted Text
ControlName
ControlName
Root.ControlName
Category Name
Text
CategoryName
CategoryName
Root.CategoryName
ControlSummary
The Formatted Text control is used to display advanced text on a touch panel.  It supports HTML text via an Indirect Text Serial Join as well as static text defined at design time.  Additionally it can be used as multiline and/or truncated text, and supports all of the CIP tags documented in the CIP HTML tag document.

Root.Properties
The Formatted Text control is used to display advanced text on a touch panel.  It supports HTML text via an Indirect Text Serial Join as well as static text defined at design time.  Additionally it can be used as multiline and/or truncated text, and supports all of the CIP tags documented in the CIP HTML tag document.  
	SWF-4-END

Root.Properties.Style
The styled graphics and font styling information that determine the look/feel of the button and button text. The graphic contains a 3 state image containing a normal state, a pressed state and a selected state.

	Page Flip
(None)
PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.

Show Control Feedback
true
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.
Suppress Key Clicks
false
SuppressKeyClicks
SuppressKeyClicks
!Root.Properties.SuppressKeyClicks4When true suppresses the key click sound on presses.

	UseShadow
.Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.UseShadow#Enables or disables shadow on text.
Shadow Distance
ShadowDistance
ShadowDistance
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance
Sets an integer value representing the number of pixels to offset the X and Y of the shadow. Valid range is 1 to 5. The default value is 2.
Shadow Angle
ShadowAngle
ShadowAngle
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45
Shadow Blur X
ShadowBlurX
ShadowBlurX
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Blur Y
ShadowBlurY
ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.
$Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties<These properties allow a shadow to be placed under the text.

	Page Flip
(None)
PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.

Root.Properties.SubpageFlipZSubpage Flip allows selection of a subpage to be made visible when this button is pressed.
Show Control Feedback
true
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

false

Shadow Distance

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance
Sets an integer value representing the number of pixels to offset the X and Y of the shadow. Valid range is 1 to 5. The default value is 2.

ShadowAngle
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45
Shadow Blur X
