ShadowBlurX
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Blur Y
ShadowBlurY
ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.
$Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties<These properties allow a shadow to be placed under the text.

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance
Sets an integer value representing the number of pixels to offset the X and Y of the shadow. Valid range is 1 to 5. The default value is 2.

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45

ShadowBlurX
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)

ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.

The styled graphics and font styling information that determine the look/feel of the button and button text. The graphic contains a 3 state image containing a normal state, a pressed state and a selected state.

Root.Properties.TextAlignment9Determines the horizontal alignment of the text and icon.
	Page Flip
(None)
PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.

Root.Properties.SubpageFlipZSubpage Flip allows selection of a subpage to be made visible when this button is pressed.
Show Control Feedback
true
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

ScaleX
ScaleX
&Root.Properties.PositionAndSize.ScaleXUThe ratio of the actual size of the object to the size you want it to be represented.

ScaleY
&Root.Properties.PositionAndSize.ScaleYUThe ratio of the actual size of the object to the size you want it to be represented.
Root.Properties.PositionAndSize
The locale defines the coordinates of the object on the page and the size that it is rendered as well as the Z-ordering in 3D space.

Button Style
Style
8Type="Style" categoryName="Buttons" title="Button Style"
Style
Style
1-Standard Common Btn
StyleID
StyleID
Root.Properties.Style.StyleID
Root.Properties.Style
The styled graphics and font styling information that determine the look/feel of the button and button text. The graphic contains a 3 state image containing a normal state, a pressed state and a selected state.

	IconStyle

StyleID
!Root.Properties.IconStyle.StyleID
Root.Properties.IconStyle
The styled graphics and font styling information that determine the look/feel of the icon image if it is used. The graphic contains a n state image containing icons.

	NineSlice

4Root.Properties.IconType.Image.FillType.NineSlice.x1

'Root.Properties.IconType.Image.FillType
Indicates the Fill Type used when renderng an image. Valid choices are Stretch, Stretch Aspect (maintains aspect ratio), Nine-Slice, or Tiling.
Root.Properties.IconType.ImageXThe path on the disk of the external image you wish to be displayed for this icon image.

	IconStyle
State
Use Style's State
Root.Properties.IconType.StateDThe styled graphics that determine the look/feel of this icon image.	IconStyle
UseNone	UseCustom
UseState
Root.Properties.IconType\A choice of whether to display a styled image, a custom image as an icon, or no icon at all.
Horizontal Text Alignment
Center
TextAlignment
Left|Center|Right|
TextAlignment
Root.Properties.TextAlignment9Determines the horizontal alignment of the text and icon.
	Page Flip
(None)
PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.
SubpageFlip
SubpageFlip
SubpageFlip
Root.Properties.SubpageFlipZSubpage Flip allows selection of a subpage to be made visible when this button is pressed.
Show Control Feedback
true
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.
Suppress Key Clicks
false
SuppressKeyClicks
SuppressKeyClicks
!Root.Properties.SuppressKeyClicks4When true suppresses the key click sound on presses.

NormalState
Style
NormalState
Root.Properties.NormalState'The list of states of the current style

PressedState
Root.Properties.PressedState'The list of states of the current style

SelectedState

SelectedState

Multiline Support
true
MultilineSupport
MultilineSupport
 Root.Properties.MultilineSupport4Enables or disables support for multi-line on label.

Style
Text Shadow
TextShadowProperties
Type="TextShadowProperties"
TextShadowProperties
Shadow
false	UseShadow
	UseShadow
.Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.UseShadow#Enables or disables shadow on text.
Shadow Distance
ShadowDistance
ShadowDistance
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance
Sets an integer value representing the number of pixels to offset the X and Y of the shadow. Valid range is 1 to 5. The default value is 2.
Shadow Angle
ShadowAngle
ShadowAngle
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45
Shadow Blur X
ShadowBlurX
ShadowBlurX
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Blur Y
ShadowBlurY
ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.
$Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties<These properties allow a shadow to be placed under the text.

Root.Properties.IconType\A choice of whether to display a styled image, a custom image as an icon, or no icon at all.
Horizontal Text Alignment
Center
TextAlignment
Left|Center|Right|
TextAlignment
Root.Properties.TextAlignment9Determines the horizontal alignment of the text and icon.
	Page Flip
(None)
PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.
SubpageFlip
SubpageFlip
SubpageFlip
Root.Properties.SubpageFlipZSubpage Flip allows selection of a subpage to be made visible when this button is pressed.
Show Control Feedback
true
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

false
SuppressKeyClicks

Shadow Distance
ShadowDistance
ShadowDistance
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance
Sets an integer value representing the number of pixels to offset the X and Y of the shadow. Valid range is 1 to 5. The default value is 2.

ShadowAngle
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45
Shadow Blur X
ShadowBlurX
ShadowBlurX
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Blur Y
ShadowBlurY
ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.
$Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties<These properties allow a shadow to be placed under the text.

Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.

Show Control Feedback
true
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

false
SuppressKeyClicks

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

ControlSummary
The Formatted Text control is used to display advanced text on a touch panel.  It supports HTML text via an Indirect Text Serial Join as well as static text defined at design time.  Additionally it can be used as multiline and/or truncated text, and supports all of the CIP tags documented in the CIP HTML tag document.

Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
When a join is specified and the signal is low, the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join greater than 0 is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the control to respond to press events. If no join is selected, the control will always be enabled. The analog Mode join and Focus On join will be ignored if the control system sets this join low.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.

Shadow Distance
ShadowDistance
ShadowDistance
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance
Sets an integer value representing the number of pixels to offset the X and Y of the shadow. Valid range is 1 to 5. The default value is 2.
Shadow Angle
ShadowAngle
ShadowAngle
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45
Shadow Blur X
ShadowBlurX
ShadowBlurX
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Blur Y
ShadowBlurY
ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.
$Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties<These properties allow a shadow to be placed under the text.
Root.Properties
The Formatted Text control is used to display advanced text on a touch panel.  It supports HTML text via an Indirect Text Serial Join as well as static text defined at design time.  Additionally it can be used as multiline and/or truncated text, and supports all of the CIP tags documented in the CIP HTML tag document.

Root.Properties.IsSubpage
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.
 Transition Complete Digital Join
TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the page has finished transitioning on to the subpage.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

AnalogJoinOffset
AnalogJoinOffset

An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Show Control Feedback

ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.

DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
When a join is specified and the signal is low, the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join greater than 0 is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the control to respond to press events. If no join is selected, the control will always be enabled. The analog Mode join and Focus On join will be ignored if the control system sets this join low.

-Root.Properties.RotatedPositionAndSize.ScaleYUThe ratio of the actual size of the object to the size you want it to be represented.
&Root.Properties.RotatedPositionAndSize
The rotated locale defines the coordinates of the object on the page and the size that it is rendered as well as the Z-ordering in 3D space in the rotated page orientation.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

false

PageFlip
PageFlip
Root.Properties.PageFlipTPage Flip allows selection of a page to be made visible when this button is pressed.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowDistance

0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAngle?The angle of the shadow. Valid range is 0 to 360. Default is 45
Shadow Blur X

ShadowBlurX
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurXfThe amount of horizontal blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.

ShadowBlurY
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowBlurYdThe amount of vertical blur. Valid values are 0 to 255.0 (floating point). The default value is 2.0.
Shadow Strength
ShadowStrength
ShadowStrength
3Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowStrength
The strength of the imprint or spread. The higher the value, the more color is imprinted and the stronger the contrast between the shadow and the background. Valid values are from 0 to 255.0. The default is 1.0.
Shadow Color
RGB(0,0,0)
ShadowColor
ShadowColor
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowColor
Sets the color of the Shadow.
Shadow Alpha
ShadowAlpha
ShadowAlpha
0Root.Properties.TextShadowProperties.ShadowAlpha
The alpha transparency value for the shadow color. Valid values are 0.0 to 1.0. For example, .25 sets a transparency value of 25 percent. The default value is 1.0.

Show Control Feedback
false
ShowSelectFeedback
ShowSelectFeedback
"Root.Properties.ShowSelectFeedback
Indicates whether or not to use the 'Digital Press Join' feedback to change to the 'Selected' state. If checked, the button will display its selected state only when the associated signal is high. Note that if the user is pressing the button at this time, no state change will be visible until the button is released.
Press Digital Join
DigitalPressJoin
DigitalPressJoin
 Root.Properties.DigitalPressJoin
Select a digital join to be used to send values to the control system. Alternatively, you can select a reserved join number, which triggers an action that is specific to the touchscreen. When the user places their finger down on the button, the associated signal goes high and when it is released the signal will go low. NOTE: Feedback from the control system over this join number does not affect a change to the object.
Enable Digital Join
DigitalEnableJoin
DigitalEnableJoin
!Root.Properties.DigitalEnableJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the look of the button will change to represent a disabled state and the object will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to enable the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be enabled.
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalVisibilityJoin
DigitalVisibilityJoin
%Root.Properties.DigitalVisibilityJoin
You may optionally select a digital join to receive feedback from the control system. When the signal is low, the button will not be displayed and the area will not be pressable. NOTE: If a join is selected, the associated signal must be high to display the image. If no join is selected, the button will always be displayed.
Indirect Text Serial Join
IndirectTextJoin
IndirectTextJoin
 Root.Properties.IndirectTextJoin
Select a serial join to receive feedback from the control system. The value of this join gets assigned to the button label as text. NOTE: Due to a clearing of all joins at design time, if a join is set, the design time label will not display any text. To remedy this issue see CIPS documentation.

UseProjectTheme

Is Subpage
true	IsSubpage
	IsSubpage
Root.Properties.IsSubpage
Visibility Digital Join
DigitalJoin
DigitalJoin
Root.Properties.DigitalJoin
Select a digital join to send and receive values between this subpage and the control system. This join will trigger this subpage to become shown on a digital high signal and to become hidden on a digital low signal.
 Transition Complete Digital Join
TransitionCompleteJoin
TransitionCompleteJoin
&Root.Properties.TransitionCompleteJoin
Select a digital join to send values to the control system. This join will be triggered high when the page has finished transitioning on to the subpage.
Digital Join Offset
DigitalJoinOffset
DigitalJoinOffset
!Root.Properties.DigitalJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.
Analog Join Offset
AnalogJoinOffset
AnalogJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.AnalogJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.
Serial Join Offset
SerialJoinOffset
SerialJoinOffset
 Root.Properties.SerialJoinOffset
An offset value applied to all joins located on this object and all its children. NOTE: This value is cumulative so any child objects which have this parameter will be offset by the sum of both offset values.

Select an analog join to send and receive values between this project and the control system. The value received on this join will change the theme of the project to the theme corresponding with that value. When the theme is changed internally, the index is dispatched on this join.

Sound
Play Sound Digital Join
JoinNumber
JoinNumber
'Root.Properties.Sounds.Sound.JoinNumber
Digital input trigger to play this sound (rising edge of the signal). The output digital feedback will remain high while the sound is playing until it is stopped or ends playback. Note: Reserve Joins cannot be selected for this value, and no output feedback will be produced if a Reserve Join is selected and driven high.
